name: TextInput
description: A single-line text input field for collecting short text values. Use for names, emails, URLs, search queries, and other single-line form inputs.
instructions: Use the simple TextInput for basic inputs, or compose TextInput.Root > TextInput.Slot for inputs with icon or button decorators. TextInput.Slot accepts name='left' or 'right'. Use status prop ('success', 'error', 'loading') to communicate validation state. Always pair with a Label for accessibility. Use Textarea for multi-line input.
